name: Professional Outreach
body_template:
Hi {{first_name}},

I hope this email finds you well. I noticed your work at {{company}} and was impressed by {{industry}} innovations.

I'd love to discuss how we might collaborate.

Best regards
body_template_b:
Hello {{first_name}},

Your work at {{company}} caught my attention, especially in the {{industry}} space.

I believe there's a great partnership opportunity here. Could we schedule a brief call?

Looking forward to hearing from you
